name: burpsuite
title: burpsuite
summary: platform for security testing of web applications
description:
platform for security testing of web applications
Burp Suite is an integrated platform for performing security
testing of web applications. Its various tools work seamlessly
together to support the entire testing process, from initial
mapping and analysis of an application's attack surface,
through to finding and exploiting security vulnerabilities.
.
Burp gives you full control, letting you combine advanced
manual techniques with state-of-the-art automation, to make
your work faster, more effective, and more fun.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use burpsuite because platform for security testing of web applications.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use burpsuite as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `burpsuite [options] [args]` as documented upstream for burpsuite.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair burpsuite with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `burpsuite --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
